raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE
reason=SRC-CASE-5ED33CA6CFF3-REC says the sanctions closure and payment rail approval cover different account/rail scopes, and SRC-CASE-5ED33CA6CFF3-POL requires an exact match on action, entity, account, date, amount, authority, and dependency before proceeding.
